allow: Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from botcity.core import DesktopBot; print\([m for m in dir\(DesktopBot\) if not m.startswith\('_'\)]\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from botcity.core import DesktopBot; import inspect; print\(inspect.signature\(DesktopBot.find\)\); print\(inspect.signature\(DesktopBot.add_image\)\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from botcity.core.cv2find import Box; print\(Box.__doc__\); import inspect; print\(inspect.getsource\(Box\)\)")
